title: Archives of California — A Searchable Calendar of BANC MSS C-A (Savage Transcripts)
description: An item-level calendar (finding aid) of the Archives of California (BANC MSS C-A, Bancroft Library, UC Berkeley) — Thomas Savage's 1876-77 copies and abstracts of the Spanish- and Mexican-era provincial government records of Alta California, whose originals were destroyed in 1906. Structured records with manuscript deep links, verbatim transcriptions, and cross-archive concordances.
